message:
fix: Respect --quiet flag in Chrome tab restoration messages

The tab restoration code in the scrape() finally block was printing
progress messages without checking opts.quiet:

  - "[8/8] Restoring your Chrome tabs..."
  - "Restored N tab(s)"
  - "(N additional tabs not restored to avoid overload)"

Per AGENTS.md: "Quiet mode (--quiet) suppresses progress messages but
not errors." Tab restoration is a progress notification, not an error,
so it should be suppressed in quiet mode.

Added !opts.quiet guards to all three console.error calls in the
tab restoration section. The actual tab restoration still occurs in
quiet mode; only the progress messages are suppressed.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
